text:
M1320 Status Of Most Problematic Pressure Ulcer This field indicates the status of the most problematic (observable) pressure ulcer. 00 = Newly epithelialized
01 = Fully granulating
02 = Early/partial granulation
03 = Not healing
NA = No observable pressure ulcer CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1322_NBR_PRU_STG1 M1322 (M0450) Current Number of Stage I Pressure Ulcers This field indicates the current number of stage I pressure ulcers. 00 = Zero
01 = One
02 = Two
03 = Three
04 = Four or more CHAR 2 x
